'''Solo Fleet''' was the informal name of the task force of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] assigned to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in his hunt for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7.5 ABY]]. Initially eleven starships, the fleet was expanded to thirteen after the [[Battle of Levian Two]] demonstrated the increased strength of Zsinj's forces.

The fleet was broken into three combat groups of four starships, each composed of two cruisers and two escorts. In addition, an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor Cruiser]] was loaned to the fleet by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Teren Rogriss]], who was Solo's Imperial counterpart in destroying Zsinj's fleet.

==Fleet organization==
===Group One===
*''[[Mon Remonda]]'', [[MC80B Star Cruiser|MC80B Cruiser]] under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Onoma]] and Solo's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], four squadrons: [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]], [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]]; [[Wraith Squadron|Wraith]], mixed; [[Polearm Squadron|Polearm]], [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]]; [[Nova Squadron|Nova]], [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]]
*''[[Mon Karren]]'', [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Cruiser]], three squadrons: [[Corsair Squadron|Corsair]], X-wing; 2 [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]]
*''[[Tedevium]]'', [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]], two squadrons: A-wing; [[Screaming Wookiee Squadron|Screaming Wookiee]], Y-wing
*''[[Etherhawk]]'', [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|Marauder-class corvette]]

===Group Two===
*''[[Mon Delindo]]'', MC80 Cruiser, three squadrons: two Y-wing; [[High Flight Squadron|High Flight]], X-wing
*[[Skyhook (Star Destroyer)|''Skyhook'']], [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]], six squadrons of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]]
*''[[Battle Dog]]'', modified [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|''Quasar Fire''-class bulk cruiser]] under Captain [[Geng Salaban]], four squadrons: two Y-wing including [[Lightning Squadron (New Republic)|Lightning]]; [[Shadow Squadron (New Republic)|Shadow]], X-wing; one [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape fighter]]
*''[[Warder]]'', modified [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Medical Frigate]]

===Group Three===
*[[Allegiance (Imperial I-class)|''Allegiance'']]: ''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer, six squadrons: three TIE Fighter; one B-wing; one Y-wing; [[Gauntlet Squadron|Gauntlet]], X-wing
*''[[Crynyd]]'': ''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer, six squadrons of unknown makeup
*''[[Voidrunner]]'': Nebulon-B escort frigate, two squadrons: two Y-wing
*''[[Ession Strike]]'': Corellian Corvette under Captain [[Atril Tabanne]]

===Special Operations===
*''[[Stellar Web]]'': Imperial Interdictor Cruiser
